subcodes.first_line: O friends of the Abha Beauty! It is the afternoon hour, and the north wind bloweth with tempestuous fury like unto a gale [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان جمال ابهی وقت عصر است و ریح شمال در شدت هبوب چون صرصر و جمعی در
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @martyrs and martyrdom, @firmness in the Covenant, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
